settings.name: Punarnava
settings.benefit: Meaning 'that which renews'. Supports healthy kidney function and natural diuretic activity. Premier kidney herb in Ayurveda.

settings.name: Gokshura
settings.benefit: Widely used in Ayurvedic kidney and urinary formulations. Supports healthy urinary flow and kidney tissue wellness.

settings.name: Pashanbhed
settings.benefit: Literally 'stone breaker'. Traditionally used in Ayurveda for supporting healthy kidneys and urinary tract.

settings.name: Varuna
settings.benefit: Classical Ayurvedic herb traditionally used for urinary system support and healthy kidney function.

settings.heading: Herbs from Ayurvedic Kidney Texts
settings.subheading: Sourced from trusted growers, tested for purity and potency

settings.question: What is the recommended dose?
settings.answer: Take as directed on the product label — typically 1–2 tablets or the prescribed syrup dose twice daily with warm water after meals. For specific dosage guidance, consult your Ayurvedic physician.

settings.question: How long should I take this product?
settings.answer: For comprehensive kidney wellness support, we recommend a 12-week course with consistent daily use. You can take a 4-week break before resuming. Results are cumulative with Ayurvedic formulations.

settings.question: Can I take this if I have kidney disease?
settings.answer: This product is designed for general kidney wellness support in healthy individuals, not for treatment of diagnosed kidney disease. If you have a diagnosed kidney condition, are on dialysis, or have reduced kidney function (GFR), please consult your nephrologist before use.

settings.question: Can I take this with blood pressure or diabetes medication?
settings.answer: Some herbs in this formula may interact with medications for blood pressure, diabetes, or diuretics. If you are on prescription medications, consult your doctor before starting this supplement.

settings.question: How much water should I drink while taking this?
settings.answer: We strongly recommend drinking 8–10 glasses (2–2.5 litres) of water daily while taking this product. Adequate hydration supports kidney function and helps the herbs work effectively.

settings.title: Natural support that actually works
settings.review: Been using for 2 months consistently and my overall wellness has improved. No more that heavy, tired feeling. I appreciate that it's all natural herbs. Highly recommend.

settings.title: Ayurvedic herbs that I trust
